name: Akito Miyake
description: In middle school, Akito became fond of archery and joined the club there and even participated in country-level competitions. However, he began to neglect other activities or duties, such as studies, in the process. At that time he started to create some ruckus by causing quarrels with other people. That, and the fact that he neglected his studies lead to his evaluation as a D-Class student. In high school, he once again became a member of the Archery Club. He is a good friend of Kiyotaka and is apart of the Ayanokouji friend group.
